jobs.title: AI Solutions Architect
jobs.description:
About The Team Paytm Intelligence is building next-generation AI platforms across two key areas: AI inference infrastructure and agentic AI solutions. Our focus is on enabling enterprises to move from AI experimentation to production-grade deployment with measurable business outcomes. In the agentic AI space, we are building solutions such as Outreach Manager, CLM agents, and domain-specific AI agents that automate complex customer journeys across sales, service, and operations. These systems go beyond traditional chatbots, orchestrating workflows, decisions, and actions across enterprise systems. About the role: We are hiring an AI Agentic Solutions Architect to drive enterprise adoption of AI-powered workflow automation. This role sits at the intersection of business process transformation, AI systems, and enterprise sales. You will work directly with enterprise customers to understand their workflows, identify automation opportunities, and design agentic solutions that deliver measurable outcomes such as cost reduction, conversion uplift, and improved customer experience.

Location: Noida/Bengaluru
Experience: 7-10 years
Function: AI Solutions / Enterprise Sales Engineering

Responsibilities:

Customer Journey and Workflow Design:
• Map end-to-end customer journeys across sales, support, and operations
• Identify high-impact automation opportunities
• Design agent-driven workflows across systems and teams
Solution Architecture:
• Design agentic AI systems including orchestration, APIs, and integrations
• Combine LLMs, rules, and enterprise systems into scalable architectures
Business Value Articulation:
• Translate solutions into measurable outcomes such as cost reduction and conversion uplift
• Support deal teams with ROI narratives
POC and Deployment:
• Lead proof-of-concept engagements with clear success metrics
• Ensure POCs convert to production deployments
Stakeholder Engagement:
• Engage both business and technical stakeholders
• Handle scepticism from prior AI failures
Reusable Playbooks:
• Build repeatable solution frameworks across industries
• Enable sales teams with structured use cases
Superpowers/ Skills that will help you succeed in this role:
• 5–8 years in AI/ML, SaaS, or workflow automation
• Experience working with enterprise customers
• Strong understanding of customer journeys and business processes
• Familiarity with APIs, integrations, and enterprise systems
• Ability to communicate with both technical and business stakeholders
Key Result Areas (KRAs)
• Deal Impact: Influence deal progression and win rates
• POC Conversion: Convert pilots to production deployments
• Business Value Articulation: Deliver quantified outcomes
• Workflow Depth: Build strong, repeatable use cases
• Customer Credibility: Build trust with enterprise stakeholders  Why join us: Merit-based culture that thrives on self-motivated & driven individuals who are set out to make a successful career in India’s fastest-growing Fintech Organization. Agile & democratic setup that gives space to your creativity, and offers the opportunity to work at scale coupled with an environment that encourages diverse perspectives at all times.

 Compensation: If you are the right fit, we believe in creating wealth for you With enviable 500 mn+ registered users, 21 mn+ merchants and depth of data in our ecosystem, we are in a unique position to democratize credit for deserving consumers & merchants – and we are committed to it. India’s largest digital lending story is brewing here. It’s your opportunity to be a part of the story!

Why join us: Merit-based culture that thrives on self-motivated & driven individuals who are set out to make a successful career in India’s fastest-growing Fintech Organization. Agile & democratic setup that gives space to your creativity, and offers the opportunity to work at scale coupled with an environment that encourages diverse perspectives at all times.

 Compensation: If you are the right fit, we believe in creating wealth for you With enviable 500 mn+ registered users, 21 mn+ merchants and depth of data in our ecosystem, we are in a unique position to democratize credit for deserving consumers & merchants – and we are committed to it. India’s largest digital lending story is brewing here. It’s your opportunity to be a part of the story!

jobs.title: Pre Sales - AI Solution Architect
jobs.description:
About Us
Paytm is India's payment Super App offering consumers and merchants the most comprehensive
payment services. As the pioneer of the mobile QR payments revolution in India, today, Paytm stands as
India’s largest payment company by Users, Merchants, Payment Transactions, and Revenue.
Paytm’s mission is to drive financial inclusion in India and bring half a billion Indians into the mainstream
economy through technology-led financial Services. Paytm enables commerce for small merchants and
distributes various financial services offerings to its consumers and merchants in partnership with
financial institutions.
Paytm has been a pioneer in the merchant space by introducing innovative solutions like QR codes to
accept payments and Sound-box to reconcile payments via voice alerts. We are also distributing loans to
these partners via our ‘Paytm for Business’ App.

About The Team
Paytm Intelligence is building next-generation AI platforms across two key areas: AI inference
infrastructure and agentic AI solutions. Our focus is on enabling enterprises to move from AI
experimentation to production-grade deployment with measurable business outcomes.
In the agentic AI space, we are building solutions such as Outreach Manager, CLM agents, and domain-
specific AI agents that automate complex customer journeys across sales, service, and operations. These
systems go beyond traditional chatbots, orchestrating workflows, decisions, and actions across
enterprise systems. About the Role
We are hiring an AI Agentic Solutions Architect to drive enterprise adoption of AI-powered workflow
automation. This role sits at the intersection of business process transformation, AI systems, and
enterprise sales.
You will work directly with enterprise customers to understand their workflows, identify automation
opportunities, and design agentic solutions that deliver measurable outcomes such as cost reduction,
conversion uplift, and improved customer experience.

Key Responsibilities
Customer Journey and Workflow Design
 Map end-to-end customer journeys across sales, support, and operations.
 Identify high-impact automation opportunities.
 Design agent-driven workflows across systems and teams.
Solution Architecture
 Design agentic AI systems including orchestration, APIs, and integrations.
 Combine LLMs, rules, and enterprise systems into scalable architectures.
Business Value Articulation
 Translate solutions into measurable outcomes such as cost reduction and conversion uplift.
 Support deal teams with ROI narratives.
POC and Deployment
 Lead proof-of-concept (POC) engagements with clear success metrics.
 Ensure POCs convert to production deployments.
Stakeholder Engagement
 Engage both business and technical stakeholders.
 Effectively handle skepticism stemming from prior enterprise AI failures.
Reusable Playbooks
 Build repeatable solution frameworks across industries.
 Enable sales teams with structured use cases.
Superpowers & Skills That Will Help You Succeed
 5–8 years of experience in AI/ML, SaaS, or workflow automation.
 Proven track record of working successfully with enterprise customers.
 Strong foundational understanding of customer journeys and core business processes.
 Technical familiarity with APIs, system integrations, and complex enterprise software architectures.
 Exceptional communication skills, with the ability to bridge the gap and communicate effectively
with both technical engineers and business stakeholders.

Key Result Areas (KRAs)
 Deal Impact: Influence deal progression and maximize win rates.
 POC Conversion: Successfully convert pilots to full production deployments.
 Business Value Articulation: Deliver quantified outcomes, data-backed ROI, and clear business
metrics.
 Workflow Depth: Build strong, highly repeatable use cases across diverse industries.
 Customer Credibility: Establish deep trust and strategic advisory standing with enterprise
stakeholders.
Culture &  Compensation

Why Join Us?
We foster a merit-based culture that thrives on self-motivated & driven individuals who are set out
to build a successful career in India’s fastest-growing Fintech Organization. We offer an agile &
democratic setup that gives space to your creativity, provides the opportunity to work at a massive
scale, and encourages diverse perspectives at all times.

Compensation Wealth Creation
If you are the right fit, we believe in creating wealth for you. With an enviable 500 million+
registered users, 21 million+ merchants, and unparalleled depth of data in our ecosystem, we are in
a unique position to democratize credit for deserving consumers & merchants—and we are
committed to it. India’s largest digital lending story is brewing here. It’s your opportunity to be a
part of the story!

jobs.title: AI Architect
jobs.description: Function: Data Science and Analysis → Data Science / Machine Learning GenAI Generative AI LLMs NLP RAG AWS Data Scientist +5 more Hugging Face LangChain Machine Learning MLOps OpenAI Requirements: 9-15 years of overall experience in software engineering / AI/ML. Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with GenAI, RAG, and LLMs. Strong proficiency in Python and ML/AI frameworks. Experience with LLM ecosystems such as OpenAI, Hugging Face, LangChain, and LlamaIndex. Hands-on experience with vector databases (e. g., Pinecone, FAISS, Weaviate, and Chroma). Knowledge of prompt engineering, embeddings, and model evaluation techniques. Experience with cloud platforms (AWS / GCP / Azure). Familiarity with MLOps practices, CI/CD, and model deployment. Strong problem-solving and system design skills.

jobs.title: AI Architect
jobs.description: Function: Software Engineering → Backend Development Agentic AI Generative AI Hibernate J2EE Java Spring Struts Requirements: 12+ years of software engineering experience, with at least 1 year in AI/Gen AI-focused roles. Currently writing production code. 3+ years of experience in solutions, architecture and engineering, with a proven track record of inheriting and scaling engineering teams. Deep hands-on experience with LLMs in production: RAG architectures, prompt engineering at scale, agentic tool-calling, evaluation and observability. Strong software engineering fundamentals: system design, API design, distributed systems, CI/CD, and production operations. Track record of personally architecting and shipping AI-powered features in a product company (not just overseeing others who did). Excellent hiring instincts: ability to source, evaluate, and close strong AI/ML talent in a competitive market. Strong cross-functional collaboration skills: experience partnering closely with Product, Design, and Data teams. Nice to Have: Experience in automotive, ERP, or complex vertical SaaS domains with messy real-world data. Familiarity with cloud-native, microservices-based architectures at scale. Contributions to open-source AI/ML projects or published research in applied AI. Experience with ML platforms/infra: model serving, feature stores, experiment tracking, and A/B testing frameworks. Understanding of responsible AI practices: bias detection, hallucination mitigation, data privacy and auditability.

jobs.title: AI Architect
jobs.description: Function: IT Operations and Support → DevOps / Cloud CI / CD Cloud Computing Containers DevOps Monitoring +8 more AWS Azure Docker GitHub Actions GitLab Helm Kubernetes Terraform We are looking for an experienced AI Architect to design and lead scalable AI/ML and Generative AI solutions. The role involves defining architecture, selecting the right tools and frameworks, and guiding teams to build production-ready AI systems aligned with business goals. Responsibilities: Design end-to-end AI/ML and Generative AI architectures. Define scalable, secure, and cost-efficient AI solutions. Lead design of data pipelines, model lifecycle, and deployment strategies. Collaborate with data scientists, engineers, and stakeholders. Evaluate and select appropriate models, tools, and frameworks. Ensure governance, monitoring, and performance optimization of AI systems. Drive best practices for MLOps and AI deployment. Mentor teams and provide technical leadership. Requirements: Bachelor's/Master's in Computer Science, AI, or a related field. Proven experience in architecting large-scale AI systems. Strong leadership and stakeholder management skills. Core Technical Skills: Strong experience in Python and ML frameworks (TensorFlow / PyTorch). Expertise in ML lifecycle and model deployment. Hands-on experience with cloud platforms like Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform. Experience with data platforms and big data tools (Spark, Databricks). Strong understanding of APIs, microservices, and system design. Generative AI and LLM Expertise (Must-Have / Strong Preference): Experience with LLMs like GPT, LLaMA, or similar. Hands-on with frameworks like LangChain and LlamaIndex. Strong understanding of RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architectures. Experience with vector databases and embeddings. Prompt engineering, evaluation, and fine-tuning techniques. Designing scalable GenAI applications (chatbots, copilots, automation systems). MLOps and Deployment: Experience with CI/CD and MLOps pipelines. Knowledge of containerization using Docker. Experience with orchestration tools like Kubernetes. Familiarity with model monitoring and observability tools. Good to Have: Experience with Amazon EKS or similar managed Kubernetes services. Exposure to Responsible AI, governance, and compliance frameworks. Experience in multi-cloud or hybrid architecture.

jobs.title: Senior AI Architect - Data Science
jobs.description: Function: Data Science and Analysis → Data Science / Machine Learning Machine Learning Python PyTorch We're seeking a Senior AI Architect to design enterprise-scale AI/ML platforms that bridge business needs with production reality. You'll define how models are deployed, monitored, and scaled, focusing on architecture, reliability, and operationalization rather than model development itself. This role sits at the intersection of AI strategy, platform engineering, and technical leadership, ensuring AI capabilities scale efficiently for the products. The core responsibilities for the job include the following: AI Platform Architecture and Design: Design end-to-end AI platform covering data pipelines, feature engineering, model training, deployment, serving, and monitoring. Define reference architectures for key use cases: real-time inference, batch predictions, recommendation systems, and NLP/CV pipelines. Make technology stack decisions balancing model accuracy, latency, cost, and maintainability. Design cloud-native, scalable architectures using Kubernetes, microservices, and event-driven patterns. Production ML and Model Serving: Architect high-throughput, low-latency model serving infrastructure with HA requirements. Establish deployment patterns: A/B testing, canary releases, shadow deployments, rollback strategies. Guide model optimization: quantization, pruning, distillation, ONNX/TensorRT compilation. Design comprehensive model validation frameworks with offline/online metrics and quality gates. MLOps and Platform Engineering: Build end-to-end MLOps: automated pipelines, model versioning, artifact management, CI/CD. Design model registries with metadata management and promotion workflows (dev, staging, prod). Architect feature stores ensuring consistency between training/serving and low-latency access. Establish standards for reproducibility: environment management, data versioning, and experiment tracking. Observability and Production Support: Design ML observability: track latency, throughput, prediction distribution, feature/output drift. Implement automated alerting for accuracy drops, latency spikes, and data quality issues. Build stakeholder dashboards showing model performance, system health, and business impact. Technical Leadership and Strategy: Conduct design reviews, provide architectural guidance, and make final technical decisions. Mentor data scientists and engineers on production best practices and system design. Design and Code Review AL/ML Model and Algorithm code. Define platform standards: coding practices, documentation, architectural decision records. Evaluate emerging technologies (LLMs, RAG, multimodal models) and assess organizational fit. Partner with product, engineering, and compliance teams on AI governance and strategy. Requirements: 12+ years in software engineering with 6+ years in AI/ML architecture and production deployment. Proven track record architecting ML platforms serving enterprise-scale production workloads. Strong foundation in both data science principles and production engineering practices. Core Technical Skills: Python expertise: ML workflows, PyTorch/TensorFlow, scikit-learn, pandas, FastAPI/Flask. Container orchestration: Kubernetes, Docker, Helm; model serving: TorchServe, Triton, Seldon, KServe. MLOps tools: MLflow, Kubeflow, Airflow, DVC, W B (or equivalent platforms). Distributed systems: microservices, event-driven architecture, REST/gRPC APIs, Kafka, Redis. Data infrastructure: PostgreSQL/MongoDB, StarRocks, feature stores (Feast/Tecton). Cloud platforms: Deep expertise in AWS/GCP/Azure (compute, storage, networking, ML services). Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki stack, and cloud-native monitoring solutions. AI Architecture Knowledge: Strong grasp of ML fundamentals, model lifecycle, and evaluatio

jobs.title: VuNet Systems - Architect - Generative AI/Agentic AI
